browse.title: Browse
browse.description: Search and preview your sample library
browse.emptyHint: Add source folders to scan your audio samples
browse.exportHint: Set up an export folder to organize your samples for your DAW

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Directories CrAIte scans for audio samples
sources.noSourcesHint: Auto-detect sample folders on your system or add one manually

export.title: Library Output
export.description: Configure how CrAIte organizes your samples
export.chooseHint: Choose where CrAIte will create your organized library
export.emptyHint: Add source folders and scan your samples first

settings.title: Settings
settings.autostartDescription: Start CrAIte when you log in
settings.backgroundScanDescription: Periodically scan sources for new samples
settings.scanIntervalDescription: How often to check for new samples
settings.restartOnboardingDescription: Reset the app and go back to the welcome screen
settings.clearCacheDescription: Delete database, settings, and generated library
settings.footer: CrAIte minimizes to the system tray when closed and continues scanning in the background.

notify.scanFailed: Scan failed. Check folder permissions and try again.
notify.generateFailed: Library generation failed. Check disk space and permissions.
notify.dawSetupFailed: Failed to set up DAW library folder.

welcome.subtitle: Your intelligent sample library
welcome.description: CrAIte scans your folders, organizes your samples by category, and makes them instantly accessible from your DAW.

scan.slowHint: Large libraries may take a moment...

result.noSamplesHint: Add a folder containing your audio samples to get started

daw.title: Choose your DAW
daw.subtitle: CrAIte will create a library folder accessible from your DAW

ready.title: You're all set
ready.subtitle: {samples} samples organized across {categories} categories
ready.searchDesc: Find any sample instantly by name or category
ready.previewDesc: Listen to samples before using them
ready.addSourcesDesc: You can always add new folders from the library
